'''gafoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hibakusha|hibakusha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hibakusha|hibakusha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gafoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæfeketh|gæfeketh]] || [[word:gæfekej|gæfekej]] || [[word:gæfekesh|gæfekesh]] || [[word:gæfeke|gæfeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gafofokoth|gafofokoth]] || [[word:gafofokoj|gafofokoj]] || [[word:gafofokosh|gafofokosh]] || [[word:gafofoko|gafofoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gafokoth|gafokoth]] || [[word:gafokoj|gafokoj]] || [[word:gafokosh|gafokosh]] || [[word:gafoko|gafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gafofkoth|gafofkoth]] || [[word:gafofkoj|gafofkoj]] || [[word:gafofkosh|gafofkosh]] || [[word:gafofkof|gafofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gafokotho|gafokotho]] || [[word:gafokojo|gafokojo]] || [[word:gafokosho|gafokosho]] || [[word:gafokoko|gafokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gafokoth|gafokoth]] || [[word:gafokoj|gafokoj]] || [[word:gafokosh|gafokosh]] || [[word:gafoko|gafoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gafokothol|gafokothol]] || [[word:gafokojol|gafokojol]] || [[word:gafokoshol|gafokoshol]] || [[word:gafokokol|gafokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gafokothotho|gafokothotho]] || [[word:gafokojojo|gafokojojo]] || [[word:gafokoshosho|gafokoshosho]] || [[word:gafokoko|gafokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gafokothon|gafokothon]] || [[word:gafokojon|gafokojon]] || [[word:gafokoshon|gafokoshon]] || [[word:gafokokon|gafokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gafokothoro|gafokothoro]] || [[word:gafokojoro|gafokojoro]] || [[word:gafokoshoro|gafokoshoro]] || [[word:gafokokoro|gafokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
